title: Fire, Water & Grain: The Story of Empire Rye
original_title: Fire, Water & Grain: The Story of Empire Rye
overview: See how one man's journey into New York's history started a movement. Meet a group of craft distillers, farmers, entrepreneurs, historians, and policymakers as they band together to celebrate the past, present, and future of Rye Whiskey and what it means to the people of the state that made it famous.
